title: envr CLI JSON line envelope
description: Every `--format json` response is a single JSON object on one line (no pretty-print). Interpretation of `data` depends on `message` (stable string id). See docs/cli/output-contract.md and sibling `data-*.schema.json` files.

schema_version.description: Bump when envelope or documented data contracts change incompatibly.

code.description: Error code token when success is false; null on success unless a command uses a non-null code on success (e.g. doctor with issues).

message.description: Stable result id (e.g. list_installed, show_current). Not for end-user prose.

data.description: Command-specific payload; validate with the data schema that matches `message`.

diagnostics.description: Error chain or hints; often empty on success.
